_purpose: Self-pinned regression goldens: abgen's OWN deterministic output (SHA256 per bundle), one representative entity per hard-won fix-family. This is NOT a Unity-parity assertion -- it pins abgen's reproducible bytes so the named fixes cannot silently regress even when the external val-300 reference corpus is unavailable. Verify with dev/check_goldens.sh; re-bless after a LEGITIMATE output change with dev/check_goldens.sh --update.
_recipe: fork-reference mode (NO --v38-compat / --real-textures): abgen-corpus --entity-ids <cids> <out> --platform windows -j 8. Reproducible. Do NOT use --v38-compat for goldens (ABGEN_V38_TIMESTAMP embeds wall-clock ticks => non-reproducible).
_content_root_note: Inputs are read from $ABGEN_CONTENT_ROOT (the local content store, gitignored, ~6.8M files). The verifier SKIPS (exit 0) if the store or an entity's input is absent, so fresh checkouts stay green.
_turbojpeg_note: Run inside an FHS env, or set TURBOJPEG_LIB=/path/to/libturbojpeg.so.0. Outside it JPEG decode silently falls back to the image crate and ~textured bundles change bytes (the libturbojpeg footgun).
